calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"cat schemas/prediction.schema.json && cat schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && cat schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73392441 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73392441 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor && rg --files data/cases/scotus/73392441 | rg -v '/(outcome|evaluations)/'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73392441/events/evt-petition-disposition -maxdepth 5 -type f -not -path '*/evaluations/*' -not -name 'outcome.json' -print | sort && find data/cases/scotus/73392441 -maxdepth 4 -type d -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"ls -la data/cases/scotus/73392441/record data/cases/scotus/73392441/record/snapshots data/cases/scotus/73392441/record/documents && cat data/cases/scotus/73392441/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"cat data/cases/scotus/73392441/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json && cat data/cases/scotus/73392441/record/documents/documents.json && cat data/cases/scotus/73392441/record/documents/questions-presented.txt && cat data/cases/scotus/73392441/record/documents/petition.txt && cat data/cases/scotus/73392441/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n -A80 -B4 \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition|Segment base rate by salience band|relist|CVSG|originating circuit|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 420","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '135,280p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n \"salience|fee class|Paid|IFP\" metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.scotus_cert_terms // .cert_terms // empty' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.terms' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 320 && jq '.sections | keys' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.sections[] | {label, slug, scope, rows: (.rows|length)}' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.sections[0] | keys, .' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 220","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq -r '.sections[] | [.title,.group_by,(.court // \"\"),(.cert_stage // \"\"),(.weighted|tostring)] | @tsv' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],q:"\"summary judgment\" \"Seventh Amendment\"",filed_before:"2026-07-18",order_by:"score desc",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],q:"\"Seventh Amendment\" \"States\" \"not applicable\"",filed_before:"2026-07-18",order_by:"score desc",num_results:8,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url"]}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],q:"\"Seventh Amendment\" \"not applicable to the States\"",filed_before:"2026-07-18",order_by:"score desc",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url"]}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],case_name:"Tolan v. Cotton",filed_before:"2026-07-18",order_by:"score desc",num_results:3,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url"]}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73392441/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T000130Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data && git status --short && find data/cases/scotus/73392441/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T000130Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);
